description: A dispatch packet written to a volatile temp dir was cleared between steps; the vendor CLI ran with an empty prompt.
expected: The vendor receives the intended prompt.
actual: The vendor received an empty prompt and replied 'I am ready, tell me what you want changed'.
decision: Add validateAgentDispatchPacket guard and persist prompts to a durable path before dispatch.
lesson_learned: Never invoke a vendor with an empty or near-empty prompt; persist agent prompts to a durable project-scoped path before dispatch, never volatile temp.

description: Headless codex hung on stdin and agy --print emitted no Q&A text to stdout.
expected: Headless vendor calls return text deterministically.
actual: codex exec blocked on 'Reading additional input from stdin'; agy --print produced empty stdout because it runs as an agentic file-modifier.
decision: Run codex exec with stdin closed; capture Antigravity output by instructing it to write the answer to a file.
lesson_learned: For headless multivendor runs close codex stdin with </dev/null, capture Antigravity output via file-write, and refresh its short-lived token before each call.
